content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Cranky Concierge: Travel Coordinator Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America California Customer Support, Admin, Communication Skills, and Customer Service Customer Support Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5759/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Long Beach, CA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://crankyconcierge.com/">https://crankyconcierge.com/</a> </p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl">The&nbsp;<strong class="framer-text">Travel Coordinator’s </strong>primary responsibilities are to manage inbound emails and phone calls, facilitate customer onboarding, and keep the virtual office running smoothly. This role is well suited for someone who enjoys staying organized, communicating clearly, and helping keep things moving in a fast-paced environment.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"><strong class="framer-text">Schedule</strong></p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl">This is a full-time, fully remote position and the standard working hours are 10am to 7pm ET Monday through Friday.</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"><strong class="framer-text">Job Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Manage inbound emails and phone calls in a timely and professional manner.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Set up new trips for the Travel Planning team to work on.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Be the friendly, professional first point of contact for our clients.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Inform new and existing clients about our services and pricing.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Assist with administrative tasks such as processing refunds, filing for compensation, and other pre- and post-travel tasks as needed.&nbsp;</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">As time allows, assist with travel planning tasks including but not limited to: quoting travel insurance, purchasing seat assignments, and issuing tickets.</p> </li> </ul> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl">If this sounds like the kind of thing you like to do, then keep reading!</p> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"><strong class="framer-text">What Matters in this Role</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Reliability</strong>. The team will be depending on you to stay on top of and manage the daily flow of client communications.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">English proficiency.</strong> Native-level written and verbal English is required.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Attention to detail.</strong> You’ll be managing a lot of information, sometimes under time pressure, so accuracy matters.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Ability to work under pressure</strong>. You’re responsible for ensuring that the relevant information reaches the right person in a timely manner even when there’s a lot going on.&nbsp;</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Humility and teamwork. </strong>If you don't know the answer, be willing to ask others on the team for help.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Calm and collected</strong>. You must be able to roll with the punches and maintain a calm demeanor. The client may be stressed and angry; you can't be.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">U.S. Work Authorization</strong>. To do this job, you’ll need to be legally authorized to work in the U.S. for any employer, without sponsorship.&nbsp;</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Background check.</strong> A clean background check will be required as this role involves handling sensitive client data.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Location. </strong>This is a remote position, but you must be available and accessible during your standard working hours.</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Technology</strong>. You’ll need your own computer (Windows or Mac), <em class="framer-text">reliable</em> high-speed internet and a smartphone (Android or iPhone).&nbsp;</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text"><strong class="framer-text">Workspace</strong>. You’ll need access to a quiet work environment to accommodate communication with clients via email and phone.&nbsp;</p> </li> </ul> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"><strong class="framer-text">Compensation</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Starting at $17/hr, depending on skills and experience&nbsp;</p> </li> </ul> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"><strong class="framer-text">Benefits&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl"> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">15 days of PTO per year, accruing from date of hire</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Paid Federal holidays</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Health insurance</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">3% retirement match&nbsp;</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Monthly phone and internet stipend&nbsp;</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Access to exclusive travel industry discounts after 6 months of employment</p> </li> <li class="framer-text"> <p class="framer-text">Two company get-togethers each year</p> </li> </ul> <p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-xpy0dl">We can't stress enough how important attention to detail is, so <strong class="framer-text">please be sure to tell us your favorite airline in your application.</strong></p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/cranky-concierge-travel-coordinator">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/cranky-concierge-travel-coordinator</a></p> Wed, 08 Jul 2026 22:56:12 +0000 Fri, 07 Aug 2026 22:56:12 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/cranky-concierge-t
